Frankestein Transformer

Streamlit GUI

Streamlit web interface for schema-driven YAML configuration building.

Provides a multi-tab web application that dynamically renders form fields from the training configuration JSON Schema, generates YAML output, and offers CLI command construction with background execution via nohup. Supports English and Spanish UI localization.

src.streamlit_gui.app.build_cli_command(command: str, config: Dict[str, Any], output_path: str) → str[source]

Build the CLI command based on the selected command and configuration.

src.streamlit_gui.app.build_config_from_schema(schema: Dict[str, Any]) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Build the configuration dictionary from the schema and user input.

src.streamlit_gui.app.get_current_language() → str[source]

Return the active UI language.

src.streamlit_gui.app.get_field_description(field_schema: Dict[str, Any]) → str[source]

Return the localized description for a schema field.

src.streamlit_gui.app.get_field_title(field_schema: Dict[str, Any], fallback: str) → str[source]

Return the localized title for a schema field.

src.streamlit_gui.app.get_localized_schema_value(field_schema: Dict[str, Any], key: str, fallback: str = '') → str[source]

Return localized schema metadata, falling back to English when needed.

src.streamlit_gui.app.get_ui_text(key: str) → str[source]

Return localized static UI text.

src.streamlit_gui.app.load_schema() → Dict[str, Any][source]

Load the training configuration schema.

src.streamlit_gui.app.main(argv=None)[source]

Main Streamlit app entry point.

src.streamlit_gui.app.render_field(field_name: str, field_schema: Dict[str, Any], parent_key: str = '', level: int = 0) → Any[source]

Render a form field based on its schema type.

src.streamlit_gui.app.render_object(obj_name: str, obj_schema: Dict[str, Any], parent_key: str = '', level: int = 0) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Render an object schema with all its properties.

src.streamlit_gui.app.render_optimizer_section(optimizer_class: str) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Render the optimizer configuration section.

src.streamlit_gui.app.run_command_with_nohup(command: str, log_file: str) → Popen[source]

Run a command with nohup in the background.
